subject: Playwright MCP
evidence_used: CVE-2025-9611 (NVD exact ID) + GitHub release v0.0.40
live_finding: NVD exact record says versions prior to 0.0.40 fail to validate Origin and allow DNS rebinding to invoke MCP tool endpoints; release v0.0.40 adds allowed-hosts with explicit DNS-rebind defense wording.
promotion_state_now: Yes for this frontier candidate: public vulnerability record plus direct vendor remediation surface now exist, even though repo-level GitHub security advisories remain absent.
paper_thesis_delta: This evidence can support the first bounded plugin/MCP trust-boundary row and remove the explicit supply-chain/plugin zero state if shared-package integration confirms the current row schema fit.
overread_to_avoid: Do not overread the release note as a formal GitHub security advisory, incident-realization proof, or broader MCP-ecosystem prevalence claim.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Promote one bounded Playwright MCP row into the shared security package, then re-run Table 6 / gap-register counts with the zero state removed.

subject: GitHub Copilot cloud agent
live_finding: Keyword probe returns CVE-2026-45033 on GitHub Copilot CLI bare-repo code execution, which is adjacent to agentic coding workflows but not exact evidence about the cloud-agent MCP/package-registry/browser-download trust boundary documented in the current frontier candidate.
promotion_state_now: No exact promotion for SEC-SCF-001 from this bounded probe.
paper_thesis_delta: Useful negative evidence: public Copilot keyword hits can drift into CLI-local execution issues rather than the cloud-agent trust boundary currently tracked in LIMEN.
overread_to_avoid: Do not collapse Copilot CLI and Copilot cloud agent into one row just because both are GitHub coding-agent surfaces.
next_smallest_publishability_move: If this frontier stays active, require a cloud-agent-specific advisory or incident writeup tied to firewall allowlists, MCP, package-registry, or browser-download trust boundaries.

subject: Stripe MCP
live_finding: Bounded NVD keyword probe returned zero results; the current local package still has documentation-rich but event-poor Stripe MCP evidence only.
promotion_state_now: No promotion: still docs-only within this bounded public pass.
paper_thesis_delta: Strengthens the claim that high-stakes tool surfaces should remain frontier/limitations material until an event-grade public source appears.
overread_to_avoid: Do not convert zero NVD hits into a security-safety conclusion; it only describes this bounded public probe.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Hold Stripe MCP as a frontier candidate and prefer the now-exact Playwright MCP route first.
